title: luzama aurorae
side_effects: Luzama aurorae can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe stomach cramps, nausea, and dizziness. Prolonged exposure to its extracts can lead to respiratory issues, including wheezing and shortness of breath. In rare cases, excessive consumption of luzama aurorae can cause hallucinations, erratic behavior, and even seizures. Additionally, individuals with pre-existing heart conditions may experience irregular heartbeat and palpitations when using luzama aurorae without proper guidance.
